compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Coromon
- Steam AppID of the game: 1218210

## System Information
- GPU: RX6700XT
- Driver/LLVM version: Mesa 22
- Kernel version: 5.17.1-3
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/screwylightbulb/9fc89868898d07751b1df7fcdc389016):
- Proton version: 7.0-2

## I confirm:
- [*] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [*] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Proton log
[steam-1218210.tar.gz](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/8662027/steam-1218210.tar.gz)

## Symptoms 

Game starts and runs fine, but after a while starts to stutter and slow down a lot. Tried with both Proton 7.0-2 and Experimental. Have noticed other people support similar issues. 

## Reproduction

Start game and play for a while until it starts to stutter. Time until this happens will vary from play to play.
symptom_summary:

Tags: Game Crash, Black Screen, Language Issue

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Call Of Duty. Modern Warfare. WARZONE
- Steam AppID of the game: Not in Valve Steam Store Archive. Used setup.exe from Official game website.

## System Information
- Distro: kDE-NEON
- PPA: Kisak_PPA(s), Canonical-X-Staging_PPA, Canonical-Proposed_PPA, UDC_PPA, Graphics PPA 
- Repos: Ubuntu Proposed and Backports enabled.
- Repos: kDE-NEON_User_LTS_ stable.
- GPU: nVidia GTX 1050 (2G_RAM)
- Driver/LLVM version: nVidia 495 from Launchpad Graphics PPA
- Kernel version: 5.13.0-22 - generic w/ extra nvidia sig,object and modules packages
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/):
- Proton version: Experimental -Bleeding Edge -Beta w/ Proton BattleEye installed

## Gist. Sys. Report
https://gist.github.com/username-murphy/cecc0bf365612034a71fc2ccc8aa1484

## I confirm:
- [ X ] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [ X ] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)-->

## Symptoms
Call of Duty Warzone doesnt work.

#### Reproduction
The best result I had was using the SteamClient- Beta with Proton-Battle Eye / Proton Experimental - bleeding edge - Beta.
Proton-Battle eye IS needed.? I think? It appeared to be the case.
I dont know why and the latest GER-Proton doesnt work at all.
Battlenet installs perfectly and is 100% functional.
I used Battlenet and BattleNet-Beta.
The results from both were indistinguishable.
Call of Duty Warzone when launched fails.
Then after a moment the option to start the game in safe mode appears.
Select either option and the game begins to launch.
The Activision launch Splash video plays.
The Steam Overlay Pop up in the bottom right hand corner appears.
Next the " Terms of Agreement"  page is presented.
Here the mouse works but I had no button functionallity to select that I agree  to the "Terms of Agreement"
This page freezes, crashes then returns to BattleNet.
I used various combinations of Proton and Battlenet [ comand% switches ] with varying degrees of improvement.
I was using a GTX1050(2G) with dx11 command switched in both Proton and BattleNet.
I'll try again latter using the Dx12 capable nVidia RTX.
Nothing happened when Proton-BattleEye wasnt installed.
I know BattleEye is not BattleNet like BattleEye is not Proton-BattleEye.
I have no idea why this is the case I'm just reporting the facts so someone might have an easy win.
I just did blunt force whatevers until bluntforce whatevers made an advance in the right direction.

SYSTEM INFORMATION:
https://gist.github.com/username-murphy/cecc0bf365612034a71fc2ccc8aa1484

-->

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Dragon's Dogma 2
- Steam AppID of the game: 2054970

## System Information
- GPU: RTX 4070 Ti
- Video driver version: Nvidia 550.67
- Kernel version: 6.8.1
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/):
https://gist.github.com/frozen-sea/3e3b1b2eab46f5ecb15ad3ce7e2f7cfa
https://gist.github.com/frozen-sea/cc2ca58035fcac0fb06d79b391f071f6
- Proton version: 9.0 (Beta), Experimental bleeding-edge

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
Not possible to enable ray tracing in the options menu. DLSS can be enabled. Tried with launch options: PROTON_LOG=1 PROTON_ENABLE_NVAPI=1 VKD3D_CONFIG=dxr %command%

Log from starting to menu and quitting: 
[steam-2054970.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/14728174/steam-2054970.log)

Also tried on Experimental bleeding-edge, which crashes immediately at the main menu if you run without PROTON_LOG and hangs on black screen at the same point when logging is enabled. Log after killing the process:  
[steam-2054970.zip](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/14728155/steam-2054970.zip)

## Reproduction
Start the game, check the graphics options
symptom_summary:
用户在《Dragon's Dogma 2》中无法在选项菜单中启用光线追踪功能，并且在使用实验性版本时，游戏在主菜单处崩溃或停留在黑屏。 

Tags: Ray Tracing Issue, Crashes, Black Screen

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: The Unfinished Swan
- Steam AppID of the game: 1206430

## System Information
- GPU: Radeon RX 6600
- Driver/LLVM version: AMD AMD DIMGREY_CAVEFISH (DRM 3.42.0, 5.15.6-2-MANJARO, LLVM 13.0.0)
- Kernel version: 5.15.6-2-MANJARO
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): [system information](https://gist.github.com/perojas3/f914194e75a37a7720937395127d1cdb)
- Proton version: 6.3-8

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)-->
[steam-1206430.log ](https://gist.github.com/perojas3/8b906b72b74131a60932b4f368e65955)

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->

When I start the game, it opens into a white screen with a swan feet as a cursor, and the closes, is not possible to start playing the game.

There is a way to get to the main menu, that is installing d3dcompiler_47 with winetricks. That allow to continue to the opening titles, and the main menu, but pressing "play" crashes the game. This are the logs with this method: [steam-1206430.log](https://gist.github.com/perojas3/2b5d7db9743e045f88d958e2b3e27bf7).

## Reproduction

Just open the game and watch it close.

[Steam Runtime Diagnostics Output](https://gist.github.com/Headcrabed/df10a66f50e0af10729892bd3c7f9eed)

## Reproduction
Just download and start the game under Fedora 40.
symptom_summary:
用户在启动游戏《The Finals》时，EAC反作弊系统不断提示需要启用安全启动，尽管安全启动已在系统中启用，且在Windows中正常工作。游戏因此无法启动。

**Tag Suggestions:**  
Anti-cheat issue  
Secure Boot required  
Game launch failure

Tags: Anti-cheat issue, Online server kick, Game version problem
